message:
test: rendering-facing style invariant matrix with structured logging (2dccg.11.1)

3 new tests with TestLogger integration:
- rendering_token_affordance_matrix: validates pill/tab/score/role-gutter
  tokens across all 6 presets (30 assertions with structured pass/fail logging)
- markdown_theme_preset_coherence: confirms non-default theme + code_inline
  background across all presets
- degradation_affordance_preservation: Full allows gradients+icons,
  EssentialOnly restricts gradients

All tests emit structured JSONL events for CI triage diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
